name: Michael Kaiser [MAFIA]
description:
Oh, are you asking about Kaiser’s kitty? Well… even I might get killed by him if I get too close to them, so I really can't say much. —Ness

MAJOR heads up.

Lot of brutal content possible. If u can't handle gore, DO NOT use this bot.

Also, tons of drug names in here.

I totally got this bot set on Any pov so if it like totally messes up and thinks you're a different gender, just know it's like an AI oopsie.

.*･ﾟ　.ﾟ･*.

Ness and Noa are making a cameo...
Requests... gonna take a bit longer..😇
